descriptionText: Bali Catspace for sale 2022 | 3 Cabins Version | Tax Paid in EUBali Catspace for sale 2022 — a practical cruising catamaran that is in good condition and ready for liveaboard use or coastal passages. She combines an ecological water-treatment pack with useful upgrades for comfort, handling and autonomy.Key specifications:Systems & power: ecological pack (freshwater purifying filter + membrane bioreactor), combined charger 70A/inverter 12V–220V 1600VA, battery controller, 2 x 12V service batteries 130Ah, extra 300L water tank (total 1060L), kit solar panels (2 x 100W — please confirm 1 or 2).Propulsion & deck gear: 2 x Yanmar 40 hp engines (upgraded), 3‑blade folding props, electric windlass 1000W, electrical winch for halyard/furler/davit, davit with electric dinghy lift and 2.80m dinghy + 5hp outboard.Sails & rigging: square‑top battened mainsail, solent, Triradial Code 0 (52 m²) with bowsprit/furler, asymmetric spinnaker, extra winch for gennaker/Code 0.Navigation & electronics: Raymarine pack (autopilot P70S, AXIOM, I70S, VHF RAY63) with optional Pack 2 upgrade (AIS, 12" touch, radar, remote autopilot).Accommodation & galley: saloon tilting bay/forward opening, fridge/freezer 265L with inverter, gas oven, microwave 220V, comfortable cockpit/flybridge cushions, blackout curtains for 3 cabins, ventilated mattress pads.Safety, renewals & extras: liferaft for 8 (without EPIRB), Rocna 30kg, Coppercoat antifouling May 2024 (8 years), stainless sun‑deck railing May 2024, renewed cushions (2024–25), EPIRP, transport/anchor set/one airport transfer/one day handover included.This Bali Catspace for sale 2022 is presented honestly and practically — she is in good condition with sensible upgrades for extended cruising and reduced environmental impact. For more information or to book your viewing don't hesitate to contact us!
descriptionHtml:
Bali Catspace for sale 2022 | 3 Cabins Version | Tax Paid in EU

Bali Catspace for sale 2022 — a practical cruising catamaran that is in good condition and ready for liveaboard use or coastal passages. She combines an ecological water-treatment pack with useful upgrades for comfort, handling and autonomy.

Key specifications:

  • Systems & power: ecological pack (freshwater purifying filter + membrane bioreactor), combined charger 70A/inverter 12V–220V 1600VA, battery controller, 2 x 12V service batteries 130Ah, extra 300L water tank (total 1060L), kit solar panels (2 x 100W — please confirm 1 or 2).
  • Propulsion & deck gear: 2 x Yanmar 40 hp engines (upgraded), 3‑blade folding props, electric windlass 1000W, electrical winch for halyard/furler/davit, davit with electric dinghy lift and 2.80m dinghy + 5hp outboard.
  • Sails & rigging: square‑top battened mainsail, solent, Triradial Code 0 (52 m²) with bowsprit/furler, asymmetric spinnaker, extra winch for gennaker/Code 0.
  • Navigation & electronics: Raymarine pack (autopilot P70S, AXIOM, I70S, VHF RAY63) with optional Pack 2 upgrade (AIS, 12" touch, radar, remote autopilot).
  • Accommodation & galley: saloon tilting bay/forward opening, fridge/freezer 265L with inverter, gas oven, microwave 220V, comfortable cockpit/flybridge cushions, blackout curtains for 3 cabins, ventilated mattress pads.
  • Safety, renewals & extras: liferaft for 8 (without EPIRB), Rocna 30kg, Coppercoat antifouling May 2024 (8 years), stainless sun‑deck railing May 2024, renewed cushions (2024–25), EPIRP, transport/anchor set/one airport transfer/one day handover included.

This Bali Catspace for sale 2022 is presented honestly and practically — she is in good condition with sensible upgrades for extended cruising and reduced environmental impact. For more information or to book your viewing don't hesitate to contact us!
